Homebrew Formulae

openimageio

Install command:

Library for reading, processing and writing images

https://openimageio.readthedocs.io/en/stable/

License: Apache-2.0

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/openimageio.json

Formula code: openimageio.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 3.1.14.1
head ⚡️ HEAD

Depends on:

ffmpeg 8.1.2 Play, record, convert, and stream select audio and video codecs
fmt 12.2.0 Open-source formatting library for C++
freetype 2.14.3 Software library to render fonts
giflib 6.1.3 Library and utilities for processing GIFs
imath 3.2.2 Library of 2D and 3D vector, matrix, and math operations
jpeg-turbo 3.1.4.1 JPEG image codec that aids compression and decompression
jpeg-xl 0.11.2 New file format for still image compression
libheif 1.23.0 ISO/IEC 23008-12:2017 HEIF file format decoder and encoder
libpng 1.6.58 Library for manipulating PNG images
libraw 0.22.1 Library for reading RAW files from digital photo cameras
libtiff 4.7.1 TIFF library and utilities
opencolorio 2.5.2 Color management solution geared towards motion picture production
openexr 3.4.13 High dynamic-range image file format
pugixml 1.16 Light-weight C++ XML processing library
python@3.14 3.14.6 Interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language
tbb 2023.0.0 Rich and complete approach to parallelism in C++
webp 1.6.0 Image format providing lossless and lossy compression for web images
zlib-ng-compat 2.3.3 Zlib replacement with optimizations for next generation systems

Depends on when building from source:

cmake 4.3.4 Cross-platform make
pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
pybind11 3.0.4 Seamless operability between C++11 and Python
